'''Jalus Nebl''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] who was working as a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]' [[Spice/Legends|spice]] operation on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] at the same time as [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].

==Biography==
When Han first came to Ylesia he asked Jalus several questions; one of them was why the Sullustan was unable to fly. Jalus told him that he was allergic to the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] he had been hired to ship. Once he had healed sufficiently to travel off-planet, Han and Jalus brought a message and a gift to [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] for [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron|Jiliac]]. The Sullustan would later save Han, [[Bria Tharen]], and [[Muuurgh]] from being captured by the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']] by flying the ''[[Ylesian Dream]]'', the freighter attached to the operation, through its tractor beam. He later renamed the ship ''Dream of Freedom'' after he had fled from Ylesia and joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. He died in the [[Battle of Ylesia]], where he and three other Rebel landing craft were taken by surprise and shot down by the recently-installed [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] in [[Peace City|Colony One]].
